title: SR BlackRose 16x
description: SR BlackRose PVP created by 🌸 SR カラス 🌸
body:
SR BlackRose PVP By 🌸 SR カラス 🌸

This texture pack is called BlackRose 16x its pvp pack
almost all textures have been modified,even the main menu :

![main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bc3857d27769c06cc3db9160551fb4b87c36deb_0.webp)









the diamond and all diamond tools and armors have a new colour , black :                                                                                                                   
![diamond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1b482f7b26cf819fd5edcf5db958301ef41c086.png)

other pvp items such as fishing rods, swords, and bow have been modified![pvp item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61d8c6e5bd4c96f86cff5f355ccf60cf111d0ded.png)


the apples,the golden apples and the enchanted golden apples have been modified and the other foods have the new texture of the 1.20![foods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b15782c42ac84461f6ef548c8f980007110239.png)

my pack has connected glass
![connected glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0968a4c4c18d757ad19890826c1aa9f70d361ef9.png)

all wool and carpets have been modified![wool and carpet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a607ffdb4a66d5d51370f254e6fcebc8e336613.png)

this pack has modified skies:

night :
![night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1d1346fa4b9226bec0f1cdedd54105241e7c960_0.webp)

and day :
![day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9638da9222c05fb9e0e7247c67a147d593584321_0.webp)

# ⚠️ optifine required ⚠️

otherwise customised skies and connected glass won't work !
